response.justification: Maria has strong distributed systems experience and broad technical depth across languages and architectures, with relevant exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling; however, her resume inconsistently uses her own name (Maria Rodriguez) versus the profile name (Szabo Bogdan), raises red flags about authenticity, and lacks explicit evidence of ownership in AI-native engineering environments or operational on-call responsibility, which are critical for this role.
strengths: Proven experience in distributed, high-throughput systems (e.g., millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby)
Direct involvement in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq
Strong full-stack versatility with Python-adjacent tools (Node.js, TypeScript) and open-source contributions
concerns: Name discrepancy between resume header (Maria Rodriguez) and online profiles (Szabo Bogdan) suggests possible fraud or misrepresentation
No clear evidence of operational ownership or incident response on-call experience
Limited explicit mention of Python mastery or AI/ML product hands-on work, despite role requirements
